steps.instruction: 135 shots - Panasonic GF7 processed with agisoft photoscan Here are nice little stairs in the Fougères Castle - France, nice color and atmosphere - Hope you will like it. feel free to comment. I've got more assets and models to come "soon". Source: Objaverse 1.0 / Sketchfab
